semantic_setup.description: Global semantic install status. Horizontal core answers may live directly here; domain-specific answers should point to the owning skill data file.

sources.description: Horizontal core source pointers used across many skills, such as tasks, memory/context, calendar, routine run records, and OKF-compatible knowledge bundles. Store pointers/access notes, not raw exported data.

memory.description: Pointer to the runtime's durable memory/context source plus agent-facing usage instructions. Store how to use memory, not raw memory dumps.

answer.description: Runtime pointer or short source description.

usage.description: Agent-facing instructions for reading/updating the memory source.

read_policy.description: Preferred retrieval order or read rules.

write_policy.description: Whether writes are allowed, approval-gated, or forbidden.

knowledge_bundles.description: Named OKF-compatible Markdown knowledge-bundle pointers. Values should store paths/URIs and access notes only, not raw knowledge dumps.

format.description: Use okf-markdown for Life OS OKF-compatible bundles.

path.description: Local path or runtime pointer to the bundle.

uri.description: Optional external URI for the bundle.

policies.description: Horizontal Life OS policies such as schedule, delivery, trigger default, and approval behavior. Domain-specific preferences belong in the owning skill data file.
